cards.definition: To ______ something means to succeed in doing it after trying hard.
cards.definitionExample: She worked hard to achieve her goals.
examples: You can achieve anything if you are determined.
He finally achieved his dream of becoming a doctor.

cards.definition: The ______ is the natural world, including the air, water, land, and all living things.
cards.definitionExample: We must protect the environment for future generations.
examples: Pollution is a serious threat to the environment.
The government introduced new laws to protect the environment.

cards.definition: To ______ means to put forward an idea or plan for someone to consider.
cards.definitionExample: I would like to suggest a different approach.
examples: She suggested going to the museum instead of the park.
Can you suggest a good book to read?

cards.definition: You use ______ to introduce a fact that makes the main statement surprising.
cards.definitionExample: Although it was raining, we went for a walk.
examples: Although she was tired, she continued working.
He passed the exam although he had not studied much.

cards.definition: To ______ something means to think about it carefully before making a decision.
cards.definitionExample: You should consider all the options before choosing.
examples: Have you considered moving to a bigger city?
The manager will consider your application carefully.

cards.definition: An ______ is a situation in which it is possible for you to do something you want to do.
cards.definitionExample: This job is a great opportunity for you.
examples: Studying abroad is an excellent opportunity to learn a language.
Don't miss this opportunity — it won't come again.

cards.definition: You use ______ to say that something happens even though something else might prevent it.
examples: Despite being tired, she finished the project on time.
